diff_summary: Adds per-child photo_consent + per-parent sms_marketing_opt_in boolean columns (additive migration 0009, default false), contracts schemas/fields, two session+CSRF+ownership-scoped consent PUT endpoints that write timestamped audit_outbox rows, a fail-closed ConsentAwareSmsSender marketing gate in packages/sms, and platform UI toggles.
ac_coverage: AC1 (both flags default false / opt-in), AC2 (consent edit audited with timestamp), AC3 (marketing gate reads sms_marketing_opt_in, fail-closed; transactional always sends) — all implemented and tested (api profile.test.ts, children.test.ts, sms index.test.ts).
